assertions.text: Enters audit mode (not integration or debug)
assertions.evidence: Titled 'CleverTap Android SDK Audit Guide' with audit-focused approach (static search, flow tracing, cross-referencing).
Baseline run has no access to the skill or core audit reference files.

assertions.text: Searches for onUserLogin calls across the codebase
assertions.evidence: Part 3 includes 'rg -n "onUserLogin" --glob "*.java" --glob "*.kt"' with per-flow analysis in Part 5.

assertions.text: Groups findings by feature area in the report
assertions.evidence: Part 4 report template groups into: SDK Configuration, Identity Management, Event Tracking, Push Notification, Additional Features, Risk Assessment.

Part 4.2 Identity Management table has per-flow rows (Email, Google SSO, Facebook) with 'Issues' column. Common Issues list includes 'onUserLogin called on app launch instead of only on login' and 'Missing identity keys'.
